ddls:
CREATE TABLE "monitoring_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metrics were recorded */,
  "mem_total" REAL /* Total RAM available on the server in MB */,
  "high_total" REAL /* Total high memory allocation */,
  "low_total" REAL /* Total low memory allocation */,
  "swap_total" REAL /* Total swap space available */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the server ID */,
  "load_average_1min" REAL /* 1-minute load average of the server */,
  "load_average_5min" REAL /* 5-minute load average of the server */,
  "load_average_15min" REAL /* 15-minute load average of the server */,
  "cpu_usage_percent" REAL /* CPU usage percentage */,
  "network_in_bytes" TEXT /* Network input in bytes */,
  "network_out_bytes" TEXT /* Network output in bytes */,
  "disk_read_bytes" TEXT /* Disk read in bytes */,
  "disk_write_bytes" TEXT /* Disk write in bytes */,
  "disk_io_wait_time" INTEGER /* Disk I/O wait time in milliseconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monitoring_logs_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "memory_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each memory usage entry */,
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the log ID capturing this memory usage */,
  "mem_free" REAL /* Free memory available on the server in MB */,
  "high_free" REAL /* High free memory available */,
  "low_free" REAL /* Low free memory available */,
  "memory_shared" REAL /* Memory shared across processes in MB */,
  "mem_buffers" REAL /* Memory used for buffers in MB */,
  "mem_cached" REAL /* Memory used for caching in MB */,
  "mem_used" REAL /* Total memory used in MB */,
  "swap_used" REAL /* Total swap space used in MB */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_memory_usage_log_id FOREIGN KEY ("log_id") REFERENCES monitoring_logs ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "swap_usage" (
  "swap_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each swap usage entry */,
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the log ID capturing this swap usage */,
  "swap_free" REAL /* Free swap space available in MB */,
  "swap_cached" REAL /* Cached swap memory in MB */,
  "swap_total" REAL /* Total swap space available in MB */,
  "swap_in" TEXT /* Swap space used for swapping in (bytes) */,
  "swap_out" TEXT /* Swap space used for swapping out (bytes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("swap_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_swap_usage_log_id FOREIGN KEY ("log_id") REFERENCES monitoring_logs ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "servers" (
  "server_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each server */,
  "server_name" TEXT /* Name of the server */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the server */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical or virtual location of the server */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the server (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "os_version" TEXT /* Operating system version */,
  "cpu_cores" INTEGER /* Number of CPU cores */,
  "cpu_model" TEXT /* CPU model */,
  "disk_size" INTEGER /* Total disk size in GB */,
  "disk_type" TEXT /* Type of disk (e.g., SSD, HDD) */,
  "last_reboot" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last server reboot */,
  "uptime_seconds" INTEGER /* Uptime in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_thresholds" (
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert threshold */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the server to which the threshold applies */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (memory or swap) */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Threshold value that triggers an alert */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the threshold is currently active */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert */,
  "alert_notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Description of the threshold and its significance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threshold_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_thresholds_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the threshold that triggered this alert */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Time the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message detailing the alert */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the alert */,
  "alert_resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the alert has been resolved */,
  "resolved_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_threshold_id FOREIGN KEY ("threshold_id") REFERENCES alert_thresholds ("threshold_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, operator, analyst) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., view logs, set thresholds) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string from the access request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the server the report pertains to */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  "report_size" INTEGER /* Size of the report in bytes */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report findings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reports_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scheduled_tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scheduled task */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Name of the scheduled task */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the server for which the task is scheduled */,
  "schedule_time" TEXT /* Time the task is scheduled to run */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the task is currently active */,
  "task_type" TEXT /* Type of task (e.g., memory check, swap check, disk check) */,
  "task_description" TEXT /* Description of the task */,
  "last_run_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last task run */,
  "last_run_status" TEXT /* Status of the last task run (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scheduled_tasks_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user the notification is sent to */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  "notification_time" TEXT /* Time the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, failed) */,
  "notification_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of attempts to send the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
